description_long: This is a robust, medieval-style beer mug with a cylindrical black body adorned with metallic accents and shield-shaped emblems featuring a golden lion. The mug has a thick, angular handle attached to one side, providing a secure grip. Decorative bands with circular patterns encircle the top and bottom edges, adding to its ornate appearance. The shields are riveted onto the body, giving a sense of durability and craftsmanship. The interior appears dark and metallic, with some reddish stains near the rim suggesting prior use. The overall design evokes a sense of historical or fantasy-themed drinking vessels, suitable for taverns or themed urban events.
description: A black, medieval-style beer mug with metallic accents, shield emblems, and a sturdy handle. Ornate bands and golden lion motifs enhance its robust, historical appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main shield emblem with a golden lion and the angular handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the thick handle and partial visibility of the side shields.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left and a clear look at one of the shield emblems.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying a shield emblem centered, with the handle barely visible at the back.
attribute_graphic_design: The exterior features shield-shaped emblems with golden lion motifs, metallic rivets, and decorative bands with circular patterns. The design is medieval and ornate, with a focus on metallic and dark tones.
